rootCause: Playwright E2E setup rebuilt Astro artifacts but did not generate frontend/src/generated/build_meta.json, so /build-meta.json returned HTTP 503 and /chat navigation smoke reported console resource failures.
resolution: Updated frontend/scripts/setup-test-env.js to resolve and write build metadata via scripts/write-build-meta.mjs after ensureAstroBuild(), guaranteeing runtime build metadata exists for preview/E2E runs.
